pr-PR Atelier

It offers PR and Information students a workspace where they can spend their time during or after classes, to prepare themselves for their future professions within the framework of academic courses or relations with real life customers from the sector. Here, they conceptualize, develop, discuss, and present the productions related to the courses they will choose to specialize in, either political communication or corporate communication path, in their third year. Thus, they have a portfolio of various projects they have realized, which will help them a lot when entering the sector. By participating in communication competitions in their fields, meeting with real customers, they have the opportunity to experience what professional life will bring while they are still students, and they get their first thrill of the public relations profession.
